label: Contig reads max
tooltip: Maximum number of reads mapped to a contig among those assigned to the same species

label: Ref reads max
tooltip: Maximum number of reads mapped to a reference among those assigned to the same species

label: Kraken reads
tooltip: The number of reads assigned to this species by Kraken (nucleotide-based)

label: Kaiju reads
tooltip: The number of reads assigned to this species by Kaiju (protein-based)

label: Contigs
tooltip: Number of assembled contigs matching this species

label: Best ID
tooltip: Highest % identity of contigs matching this species

label: Score
tooltip: Normalised confidence score for representative contig

label: Domains
tooltip: Maximum number of viral PFAM domains detected in a single contig matching this species

label: RDRP
tooltip: At least one contig assigned to this species contains a predicted RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRp) domain

label: Best length
tooltip: Longest reference sequence identified for this species by BLAST alignment with contigs (nt)

label: ≥30X
tooltip: Highest % 30X coverage for this species based on mapping reads back to reference sequences identified by BLAST

label: Score
tooltip: Best normalised confidence score for this species based on mapping reads back to reference sequences identified by BLAST
